registry-broker-skills
description=Skill definitions and CLI workflows for the Hashgraph Online Universal Agentic Registry.

canonical.registry=https://hol.org/registry
canonical.skillIndex=https://hol.org/registry/skills
canonical.docs=https://hol.org/docs/registry-broker/
canonical.apiDocs=https://hol.org/registry/docs
canonical.openapi=https://hol.org/registry/api/v1/openapi.json
canonical.stats=https://hol.org/registry/api/v1/dashboard/stats

artifact.apis=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hashgraph-online/registry-broker-skills/main/apis.json
artifact.schema=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hashgraph-online/registry-broker-skills/main/schemas/skill.schema.json
artifact.manifest=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hashgraph-online/registry-broker-skills/main/skill.json
artifact.citation=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hashgraph-online/registry-broker-skills/main/CITATION.cff

repository=https://github.com/hashgraph-online/registry-broker-skills
